exercises.example_sentence: 子供に野菜を食べ__させました。
exercises.translation: I made my child eat vegetables.
wrong_choice_explanations: て creates the te-form for connecting actions — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form させる
に marks the indirect object — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ before させる
を marks the direct object — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ before させる

exercises.example_sentence: 先生は学生に宿題をやら__せた。
exercises.translation: The teacher made the students do homework.
wrong_choice_explanations: し would create the masu-stem — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ for やらせる
れ would create the potential/passive form — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ
み would be incorrect conjugation — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ for やらせる

exercises.example_sentence: 母は私に部屋を掃除__させます。
exercises.translation: My mother makes me clean my room.
wrong_choice_explanations: ら would be part of the potential form — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ
た is the past tense ending — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ before させる
で indicates means or location — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ before させる

exercises.example_sentence: 会社は社員に残業__させている。
exercises.translation: The company is making employees work overtime.
wrong_choice_explanations: し would create the masu-stem — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ for させる
れ would create the potential/passive form — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ
て creates the te-form — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative stem さ before させる

exercises.example_sentence: 父は弟に買い物に行か__せました。
exercises.translation: My father made my younger brother go shopping.
wrong_choice_explanations: れ would create the potential/passive form — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ for 行かせる
ね would be incorrect conjugation — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ
け would be incorrect conjugation — it doesn't fit here because we need the causative form せ for 行かせる

exercises.example_sentence: 医者は患者に薬を飲ま__せます。
